metadata.description: Lean 4 theorem proving with guided + autonomous proving, LSP-first workflows, guardrails, and contribution helpers

plugins.name: lean4
plugins.description: Unified Lean 4 plugin (draft, formalize, autoformalize, prove, autoprove, disprove, checkpoint, review, refactor, golf, learn, diagnose) — LSP-first, scripts fallback

plugins.name: lean4-contribute
plugins.description: Draft and submit bug reports, feature requests, and insights as GitHub issues. Commands may share Lean code snippets with GitHub — review every draft before confirming.
